collections.title: Reasoning RL and Test-Time Scaling Pack
collections.hook: For readers tracking how long-chain reasoning moved from prompting tricks to RL systems, budget forcing, and verification-heavy training loops.
collections.who: LLM researchers, students building reasoning baselines, and engineers following GRPO-style systems.
collections.why_now: Reasoning models are still the highest-search AI topic, and readers want one place that links papers, repos, and implementation interfaces.

collections.title: Frontier LLM Engineering Pack
collections.hook: For readers who care about MoE, long context, compact reasoning models, synthetic data, and attention-level engineering.
collections.who: LLM infrastructure learners, model architecture readers, and people comparing technical reports.
collections.why_now: Most technical report readers do not need a full training run first; they need a structured implementation map and citation trail.

collections.title: VLM, Multimodal, and Agent Interface Pack
collections.hook: For readers following the path from visual understanding to tool-use, GUI agents, document understanding, and unified generation.
collections.who: VLM students, multimodal agent builders, and researchers looking for cross-modal repo templates.
collections.why_now: VLM work is fragmented across understanding, generation, action, and agent tasks; this track groups them by reusable interface shape.

collections.title: Video Generation and World Model Pack
collections.hook: For readers watching text-to-video, camera control, delta-token world models, and physical-AI video priors converge.
collections.who: Video generation builders, world model readers, and robotics people who need visual dynamics references.
collections.why_now: Video/world-model papers are search-heavy but scattered; a curated track makes the field easier to scan.

collections.title: 3D, Gaussian, and Rendering Pack
collections.hook: For readers connecting 3D generation, Gaussian splatting, inverse rendering, and embodied scene construction.
collections.who: 3D vision students, graphics readers, and embodied AI researchers who need a cross-paper map.
collections.why_now: 3D repos are often hard to compare because each paper uses different asset, rendering, and representation assumptions.

collections.title: Image Restoration and Low-Level Vision Pack
collections.hook: For readers in deraining, dehazing, desnowing, low-light enhancement, restoration diffusion, and flow-based restoration.
collections.who: Low-level vision researchers, restoration students, and people following CVPR restoration papers.
collections.why_now: Restoration work is easier to buy into when papers are grouped by degradation, prior, and interface rather than by conference only.

collections.title: Robotics, VLA, and Embodied AI Pack
collections.hook: For readers following vision-language-action models, bimanual manipulation, dexterous grasping, and inertial robot positioning.
collections.who: Robotics students, embodied AI builders, and people comparing action-conditioned model interfaces.
collections.why_now: Robotics papers are getting pulled into foundation-model discussions; a focused track makes this transition more legible.
